items.name: Kyro-Protocol
items.description: Kyro Protocol is an on-chain financial infrastructure built on the Stellar network that enables AI agents (AgentKyro) to own wallets, hold USDC, execute payments, and transact autonomously.

items.name: claude-pee
items.description: Use Claude Code programmatically as an interactive user

items.name: CcCompanion
items.description: Bring Claude Code to your iPhone. Open-source iOS client + tiny Python push server. Local-first, runs on your own Mac and your own phone.

items.name: mykonos-island-voxels
items.description: A browser-based isometric island builder with the soft, sun-bleached look of Mykonos. Vanilla ES modules, no bundler, mobile-friendly.

items.name: md2html
items.description: Your AI writes docs — md2html turns them into pages people actually read. A portable skill for Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity that converts long-form Markdown (plans, specs, system designs, RFCs, runbooks, postmortems, brainstorms) into self-contained HTML with Mermaid, timelines, callouts, TOC. Multi-language.

items.name: Market-Impact-Radar
items.description: 一个可自部署的私域金融新闻监测与市场影响分析系统。按预测市场影响力排序全球财经新闻，生成中文摘要与影响路径，并推送到企业微信。

items.name: agent-study
items.description: 28章AI Agent全栈课程：从ReAct循环到Claude Code逆向、MCP/A2A协议、RAG、DSPy、生产可观测性——全部为可运行Python文件，面试导向。

items.name: NeuralForge
items.description: Local-first platform for fine-tuning LLMs on consumer GPUs. QLoRA training, live monitoring, GGUF export. Built with PyTorch + FastAPI + React.

items.name: VirtualMe
items.description: Extract a person into an AI agent — through an 8-week therapist-style interview, not a form. The open-source alternative to $4K AI clone courses.

items.name: backend-handbook
items.description: 后端工程师中文深度课程 · 涵盖 Backend 通用、Go、MySQL、Redis、MongoDB、Kafka、Elasticsearch 等· 含底层原理、生产实践、陷阱清单与练习题 · 2026 技术基准

items.name: youtube-learn-skill
items.description: 🏛️ Belief Archaeology - An AI Agent skill that excavates hidden worldviews from YouTube videos instead of summarizing them. For Antigravity / Gemini CLI.

items.name: paper_pod
items.description: Local-first audio overviews for academic papers: arXiv URL, PDF, or BibTeX in, an 8-15 minute two-host podcast out, all on your laptop.

items.description: Hands-free local voice agent: faster-whisper STT, local LLM with tool use, TTS. Runs entirely on your machine.

items.name: obsidian_mcp
items.description: MCP server + 7 Claude skills for Obsidian vaults — read, search, write, and link notes from Claude / Cursor / ChatGPT. Filesystem-direct, local-first, round-trip safe.

items.name: agent-tracer-2
items.description: OpenTelemetry-native, local-first observability for AI agents. DuckDB on disk, Next.js viewer on localhost, no SaaS. Adapters for Anthropic, OpenAI, LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, and Claude Code's native OTel emit.
